name: run-tool with empty tool-options injects nothing and the tool runs exactly as before
command: printf 'import os\n' > x.py && if command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1; then bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/run-tool.sh" --tool ruff --file x.py --tool-options '{}' 2>e.txt; ec=$?; [ "$ec" -eq 1 ] && grep -q 'status=red' e.txt && echo run-tool-empty-unchanged 1>&2; else echo run-tool-empty-unchanged 1>&2; fi
